en: Hi Sharks, I'm Elyse. And I'm Sam. And we're seeking $600,000 for 3% of our company, Rocco.
ko: 아이들 중에 고르라는 거랑 같아, 진짜로.
ja: シャークスの皆さん、私はエリーゼ。私はサム。60万ドルで3%を希望します。
zhTW: 嗨鯊魚們，我是艾莉絲。我是山姆。我們要求60萬換我們公司Rocco的3%。
vi: Chao cac Shark, toi la Elyse. Va toi la Sam. Chung toi xin 600,000 do cho 3% cong ty Rocco.

en: Actually, Sam, before we get started, I'm a little thirsty. Why don't you just go grab a drink from my kitchen fridge over there?
ko: 작곡가의 일은 스포팅 세션이라는 것부터 시작해요.
ja: サム、始める前に喉が渇いた。キッチンの冷蔵庫から飲み物を。
zhTW: 山姆，在我們開始之前，我有點渴。你去那邊廚房冰箱拿杯飲料。
vi: Sam, truoc khi bat dau, toi hoi khat. Ban di lay do uong tu tu lanh bep phia kia.

en: One second, Sharks. I'm so sorry. There should be a soda in there. You might just have to dig a little bit.
ko: 뭔가를 완벽히 해냈다고 자신있게 말할 수 있을 만큼 자신감이 있진 않아요.
ja: ちょっと待って。ソーダがあるはず。
zhTW: 等一下，鯊魚們。不好意思。裡面應該有汽水。
vi: Doi mot chut, cac Shark. Xin loi. Ben trong co nuoc ngot.

en: Oh. Oh. I hate it when that happens. I can't find anything in here.
ko: TV와 영화 작곡은 항상 까다로운 일이에요.
ja: 何も見つからない。
zhTW: 噢。我討厭這種情況。我什麼都找不到。
vi: O. Toi ghet khi the nay. Toi khong tim thay gi ca.

en: There's leftovers, there's produce. Where's the drinks? I think it should be behind the lasagna or the pizza box maybe?
ko: 최종 시즌 작업 중이었는데, 하워드 햄린의 차가 해변에 있는 장면으로 시작하는 에피소드를 쓰고 있었어요.
ja: 残り物、野菜。飲み物は?ラザニアの後ろかも。
zhTW: 有剩菜、有蔬菜。飲料在哪？可能在千層面或披薩盒後面。
vi: Co do thua, co rau. Do uong dau? Co le o sau hop lasagna hoac pizza.

en: Oh, that's embarrassing. Sharks, as you can see, kitchen fridges are crowded, they're cluttered, they're just plain chaotic.
ko: 올바른 아이디어를 찾았는데 잘못된 위치에 있었다는 걸 깨달았어요.
ja: キッチンの冷蔵庫は混乱してる。
zhTW: 鯊魚們，如你所見，廚房冰箱又擠又亂。
vi: Cac Shark, nhu cac ban thay, tu lanh bep thi chat va be boi.

en: That's why we created the Rocco Super Smart Drinks Fridge. It's designed as furniture so you can keep all of your favourite drinks away from those leftovers.
ko: 작곡가가 마지막이라 팬처럼 볼 수 있는 걸 좋아해요.
ja: だからRoccoスマート飲料冷蔵庫を作った。
zhTW: 所以我們創造了Rocco超級智慧飲料冰箱。設計成家具。
vi: Vi vay chung toi tao ra tu lanh do uong thong minh Rocco. Thiet ke nhu do noi that.

en: And where you actually drink them, in the living room. You might be thinking, ah, this is just another wine fridge.
ko: 기본적으로 완성된 걸 보니까 관객의 감정을 느낄 수 있어요.
ja: 実際に飲む場所、リビングに。ワイン冷蔵庫じゃない。
zhTW: 放在你喝飲料的地方，客廳。你可能覺得這就是另一個酒櫃。
vi: Va o noi ban thuc su uong, phong khach. Ban co the nghi day chi la tu lanh ruou.

en: Sorry, Mr. Wonderful, but nobody just drinks wine anymore. We created a one-of-a-kind shelving system that accommodates all sizes of bottles and cans.
ko: 아이들 중에 고르라는 거 같아. 이 프로그램 하는 동안 아이들이 태어났거든.
ja: 今は誰もワインだけ飲まない。全サイズ対応の棚システム。
zhTW: 抱歉，沒人只喝酒了。我們設計了獨一無二的架子系統。
vi: Xin loi, khong ai chi uong ruou nua. Chung toi tao ra he thong ke doc nhat.

en: Everything from ginger shots to champagne. The top doubles as a pour, serve, store station.
ko: 선택 못 할 것 같아요. 어느 날 깨면 다를 수도 있고.
ja: ジンジャーショットからシャンパンまで。上はバーカート兼用。
zhTW: 從薑汁shot到香檳。頂部還能當吧台。
vi: Tu ginger shot den champagne. Mat tren con dung lam quay bar.

en: AKA, it's also a bar cart. And with our patent-pending sight system, you can even see inside your fridge right from your phone.
ko: 최근 거라서 아마 베터 콜 사울이요. 오늘의 대답.
ja: バーカートにもなる。アプリで中が見える。
zhTW: 也就是說，它也是一個吧台推車。用我們的專利系統，你還能從手機看到冰箱裡面。
vi: Tuc la, no cung la xe day bar. Voi he thong doc quyen, ban co the nhin thay ben trong tu tu dien thoai.

en: Imagine you're at the grocery store. You're having friends over later and you can't remember if you have enough beer. Now, all you have to do is look at the app and you'll know exactly how much you need.
ko: 정말 흥분돼요. 처음으로 오리지널 우주 밖의 작업이고 완전히 새로워요.
ja: スーパーにいる時にビールが足りるか確認できる。
zhTW: 想像你在超市，今晚有朋友來但不記得有沒有夠多啤酒。現在只要看app就知道。
vi: Tuong tuong ban o sieu thi, toi nay co ban den nhung khong nho co du bia khong. Bay gio chi can xem app.

en: So, Sharks, who's ready to do a deal and pop some champagne? I know what's coming.
ko: 기대하는 품질은 있겠지만 완전히 새로운 거예요.
ja: シャークス、誰がシャンパンを?
zhTW: 鯊魚們，誰準備好做交易開香檳？我知道接下來會怎樣。
vi: Cac Shark, ai san sang hop tac va khai truong? Toi biet tiep theo la gi.

en: Alright, you know what's coming. I know what's coming. Un, deux, trois. Le charrié de testament.
ja: わかってるでしょ。
zhTW: 你知道接下來是什麼。我知道。一二三。
vi: Ban biet tiep theo la gi. Toi biet. Mot hai ba.

en: And in front of you are the trays that come with the fridge to kind of turn it into a bar cart.
ko: 스코어에는 잘 안 쓰지만 피아노에서 아이디어를 얻어요. 5살부터 쳤거든요.
ja: 冷蔵庫に付属のバーカート用トレイ。
zhTW: 你們面前的是隨冰箱附帶的托盤。
vi: Truoc mat cac ban la nhung khay di kem voi tu lanh.

en: How much is the fridge? The fridge is $14.95 and we currently offer early access pricing of $12.95.
ko: 스튜디오에서는 절대 음식 안 먹고 커피도 안 마셔요.
ja: 冷蔵庫はいくら?$14.95。早期価格は$12.95。
zhTW: 冰箱多少錢？1,495美元，我們目前提供早鳥價1,295美元。
vi: Tu lanh bao nhieu? 1,495 do, hien tai co gia uu dai 1,295 do.

en: Is that a lot for a basic? No. As a matter of fact, I just bought two out of yours.
ko: 토마스 뉴먼 음악의 영화 "인 더 베드룸".
ja: 高い?いや。実は2台買った。
zhTW: 很貴嗎？不。事實上，我剛買了兩台別的牌子。
vi: Mac khong? Khong. Thuc ra toi vua mua hai cai cua hang khac.

en: I didn't know about yours, but of a different one. And I will tell you, yours is the right price and what the guy was trying to sell me was three times as much.
ja: あなたの方が正しい価格だ。他のは3倍高かった。
zhTW: 不知道你們的，但你們的價格對，那家要我三倍價。
vi: Khong biet cua ban, nhung gia cua ban dung, hang kia doi gap ba.

en: How does the app work? Do I actually see into the fridge? So, every time you put something in or take it out, it automatically images it.
ja: アプリはどう機能する?実際に中が見える?自動撮影だ。
zhTW: app怎麼運作？我真的能看到冰箱裡面？每次你放東西或拿東西，它就自動拍照。
vi: App hoat dong the nao? Toi thuc su thay ben trong? Moi khi ban cho vao hoac lay ra, no tu dong chup anh.

en: No scanning whatsoever and your app will update. So, I see shelf by shelf by shelf? That's an innovation I haven't seen.
ja: スキャン不要でアプリが更新される。棚ごとに見える?
zhTW: 完全不用掃描，app會自動更新。所以我能逐層看到？那是我沒見過的創新。
vi: Khong can quet, app tu dong cap nhat. Toi thay tung ke? Do la sang tao toi chua thay.

en: Now, tell us about the two of you. Yes. So, Sam and I have a combined 20 years of experience in startups.
ja: 二人について教えて。スタートアップ経験20年。
zhTW: 跟我們說說你們倆。我們加起來有20年的創業經驗。
vi: Ke ve hai ban di. Chung toi co tong cong 20 nam kinh nghiem khoi nghiep.

en: I cold emailed Casper, the mattress company, and I helped build the brand from the ground up. Then I went to Billy, the women's razor brand, which sold a few years ago to one of the biggest CPG companies.
ja: Casperにメールして、ブランド構築を手伝った。Billy も。
zhTW: 我主動寫信給Casper床墊公司，從頭開始幫忙建立品牌。然後去了Billy女性刮鬍刀品牌。
vi: Toi chu dong gui email cho Casper, giup xay dung thuong hieu tu dau. Roi sang Billy.

en: Sam spent many years at Away, leading supply chain and product development.
ja: サムはAwayでサプライチェーンを担当。
zhTW: 山姆在Away待了很多年，負責供應鏈和產品開發。
vi: Sam o Away nhieu nam, phu trach chuoi cung ung va phat trien san pham.

en: And while he was at Away, the suitcase brand, his work actually took him to fridge factories because believe it or not, there are manufacturing similarities between fridges and suitcases.
ja: 冷蔵庫工場にも行った。スーツケースと似てる。
zhTW: 他在Away行李箱品牌時，工作帶他去了冰箱工廠，因為製造過程有相似之處。
vi: Khi o Away, cong viec dua anh ay den nha may tu lanh vi co su tuong dong trong san xuat.

en: You sell it for $12.95 or $14.95. What does it cost you to make? So, our landed costs are $575.
zhTW: 成本多少？落地成本是575美元。加上運費，大約750到775美元。
vi: Gia thanh bao nhieu? Gia nhap la 575 do. Them van chuyen, khoang 750 den 775 do.

en: And then after shipping, which is another $130 to $160, depending on where you are in the country, it gets to around $750 to $775.
zhTW: 再加上運費130到160美元，取決於你在哪裡。
vi: Them 130 den 160 do van chuyen, tuy vi tri.

en: So, you don't have much margin? No. How do you sell it? Direct to consumer. How many have you sold?
ja: 利益率は少ない?どう売る?D2C。何台売った?
zhTW: 利潤不多？怎麼賣？直接面向消費者。賣了多少台？
vi: Loi nhuan khong nhieu? Ban the nao? Truc tiep den nguoi tieu dung. Ban duoc bao nhieu?

en: Just over 3,000. Sam, have you guys raised a lot of money? We raised a million dollars about two years ago.
ja: 3000台以上。資金調達は?2年前に100万ドル。
zhTW: 剛好超過3,000台。你們募了很多資金嗎？兩年前我們募了一百萬。
vi: Hon 3,000 chiec. Da goi duoc nhieu von chua? Hai nam truoc chung toi goi duoc mot trieu.

en: At what valuation? That was $10 million on a post-money save. Why are you telling us you're worth $20 million now?
ja: 評価額は?SAFE方式で1000万。なぜ2000万と言う?
zhTW: 估值多少？那是投後估值一千萬的SAFE。為什麼告訴我們你們值兩千萬？
vi: Dinh gia bao nhieu? La SAFE voi dinh gia sau goi von muoi trieu. Sao noi gia tri hai muoi trieu?

en: So, that was two years ago before we even had a prototype. We've been in market for eight months. We've done $4 million of revenue.
ja: 2年前はプロトタイプもなかった。8ヶ月で400万ドル。
zhTW: 那是兩年前，連原型都沒有。我們已經上市八個月，做了四百萬營收。
vi: Do la hai nam truoc, con chua co mau thu. Da tung ban tam thang, dat bon trieu doanh thu.

en: We're profitable. In eight months? In eight months. And you've shipped that? We've shipped that. You've shipped that?
ja: 利益出てる。8ヶ月で?出荷済み?
zhTW: 我們盈利了。八個月？八個月。都出貨了？都出了。
vi: Co lai. Tam thang? Tam thang. Da giao? Da giao.

en: That's shipped. And we've ordered enough units to be able to do a $12 million year this year, which is what we're forecasting.
ja: 今年1200万の予定。
zhTW: 我們訂了足夠做今年1200萬的貨。
vi: Chung toi da dat du hang de dat muoi hai trieu trong nam nay.

en: And on that $4 million, how much have you spent to create the buzz? So, we have a return on ad spend of five times.
ja: 広告宣伝費は?ROAS5倍。売上の20%。
zhTW: 400萬營收中花了多少做宣傳？廣告回報率五倍。大約每台花250美元或營收的20%。
vi: Chi bao nhieu de tao tieng vang? ROAS gap nam. Khoang 250 do moi tu hoac 20% doanh thu.

en: So, we spend about $250 per fridge or 20% of our revenue. Look, I like it.
ja: いいね。でも評価額が問題だ。
zhTW: 聽著，我喜歡。我喜歡這個故事、推銷、方向。你們很棒。但估值不對。
vi: Nay, toi thich. Toi thich cau chuyen, bai thuyet trinh, huong di. Cac ban tuyet voi. Nhung dinh gia sai.

en: I like the story. I like the pitch. I like the whole direction. You guys are great. I just don't like the valuation. So, here's what I'll do.
ja: 60万ドルで10%を提案する。
zhTW: 所以我這樣做。600,000美元換10%。
vi: Nen toi se lam the nay. 600,000 do doi 10%.

en: I'll give you the $600,000 for 10%. Boy, they're going to jump at that.
ja: 飛びつくだろうね。
zhTW: 他們肯定會接受。我覺得他們應該接受。
vi: Ho se nhay vao ngay. Toi nghi nen nhan.

en: I think they should. Wow, that was a very loud laugh.
ja: 笑い声が大きかった。
zhTW: 哇，那笑聲好大。
vi: Wow, tieng cuoi to qua.

en: That's what I laugh all the time. Look, I don't think you're worth more than $6 million. I'm sorry. Guys, I think it's a beautiful product.
ja: 600万以上の価値はない。すみません。いい製品だけど。
zhTW: 那是我一直笑的方式。聽著，我不覺得你們值超過六百萬。抱歉。產品很漂亮。
vi: Toi luon cuoi nhu vay. Nay, toi khong nghi cac ban tri gia hon sau trieu. Xin loi. San pham dep.

en: I'm not sure I see the vision. I just don't see it. I'm out. Thank you. Appreciate it.
ja: ビジョンが見えない。降りる。
zhTW: 我不確定我看到了願景。我退出。謝謝。
vi: Toi khong chac thay duoc tam nhin. Toi rut. Cam on.

en: Guys, here's where I'm at. Look, great product, great company. The problem is a math problem.
ja: いい製品だけど、数字が合わない。
zhTW: 各位，我的問題是數學問題。
vi: Cac ban, van de cua toi la bai toan.

en: When you price it at a $20 million valuation, in order for me to get my $600,000 back, you have to do $20 million in net cash flow profits. $20 million cash flow profits, 3% of that is my $600,000 back.
ja: 2000万の評価額で、60万を回収するには2000万のキャッシュフロー。
zhTW: 估值兩千萬，要拿回我的60萬，你們要做到兩千萬淨現金流利潤。
vi: Dinh gia hai muoi trieu, de toi lay lai 600,000, cac ban phai dat hai muoi trieu loi nhuan rong.

en: If I want to get a multiple return, since it's a risky environment, let's just say three or four times, you need to do $60, $80 million in free cash flow to give me a return.
ja: 3-4倍のリターンなら6-8千万必要。それが課題だ。
zhTW: 如果我要三四倍回報，你們需要做到六到八千萬自由現金流。那就是挑戰。
vi: Neu toi muon gap ba bon lan, cac ban can sau den tam muoi trieu dong tien tu do. Do la thach thuc.

en: That's the challenge of making this investment. So for those reasons, I'm out. Yeah, and I'm kind of in a similar place.
ja: だから降りる。私も同じだ。
zhTW: 所以我退出。是啊，我也差不多。
vi: Nen toi rut. Vang, toi cung tuong tu.

en: It's very hard to imagine that things could pan out in a way that would be good for you and for us.
ja: うまくいく結果が想像しにくい。
zhTW: 很難想像事情會以對你們和我們都好的方式發展。
vi: Rat kho hinh dung moi thu se dien ra tot cho ca hai ben.

en: I also was thinking about how I could add value to you, and I probably could find a few ways, but I don't know that I would be the best shot for you for this deal, so for those reasons, I'm out.
ja: どう価値を追加できるかも考えたけど、降りる。
zhTW: 我也在想怎麼能幫你們，可能有幾種方式，但我不是你們最好的選擇。所以我退出。
vi: Toi cung nghi cach giup, co the tim duoc vai cach, nhung toi khong phai lua chon tot nhat. Nen toi rut.

en: Lori? You know, listen, I love you both. The real problem for me is your valuation.
ja: 二人とも大好き。問題は評価額。
zhTW: 聽著，我喜歡你們倆。真正的問題是估值。
vi: Nghe nay, toi thich ca hai ban. Van de that su la dinh gia.

en: I mean, it's rough. Mark said it all. I'm not even going to try to repeat it, because he really said it all quite squarely.
ja: マークが全部言った。
zhTW: 很難。馬克說得很清楚了。
vi: Kho. Mark da noi het roi.

en: What would you consider to be reasonable? Yeah, we're open. Oh, you guys would not want to even know.
ja: どのくらいなら妥当?オープンだ。
zhTW: 你們覺得什麼是合理的？我們可以談。
vi: Cac ban nghi the nao la hop ly? Chung toi san sang.

en: Kevin was at 10. I'm going to be honest. Like, to me, you're so start-up. I would have been at 20, which you're never going to consider.
ja: ケビンは10%だった。私なら20%。
zhTW: 凱文出10%。說實話，對我來說你們太初創了。我會出20%，你們不會考慮的。
vi: Kevin de nghi 10%. That long, toi nghi cac ban qua khoi nghiep. Toi se de nghi 20%, cac ban se khong xem xet dau.

en: It just doesn't feel like the right deal, so I'm sorry. I'm out. All roads lead to Mr. Wonderful.
ja: 合わない。降りる。全ての道はケビンへ。
zhTW: 不太對。抱歉，我退出。所有的路都通向Mr. Wonderful。
vi: Khong hop. Xin loi, toi rut. Moi con duong deu dan den Mr. Wonderful.

en: Well, I really think you heard it from everybody in the same, succinct way. Valuation's a huge problem.
ja: 全員が同じことを言った。評価額が問題。
zhTW: 你從每個人那裡聽到了同樣的話。估值是大問題。
vi: Ban nghe moi nguoi noi giong nhau. Dinh gia la van de lon.

en: I actually think your offer is generous. I do. I gave him a 6 million valuation with no path to liquidity, so there's a lot of risk in it.
ja: 彼の提案は寛大だと思う。
zhTW: 我其實覺得你的報價很大方。確實。
vi: Toi thuc su nghi de nghi cua ban la hao phong. Dung vay.

en: I just happen to think my social would blow this up so huge if you were able to figure out a way to fulfill.
ja: SNSで爆発させる自信がある。
zhTW: 我覺得我的社群媒體會讓這個大爆炸。
vi: Toi nghi mang xa hoi cua toi se lam no bung no.

en: And I also think I can reduce your CAC. Do you mind if we talk about your offer for a second? Speak amongst yourselves.
ja: コストも下げられる。提案について話していい?
zhTW: 我也能降低你們的獲客成本。能討論一下你的報價嗎？你們自己討論吧。
vi: Toi cung co the giam chi phi. Co the ban ve de nghi cua ban khong? Cac ban tu ban di.

en: A lot of whispering going on. No, I've actually been thinking about your free cash flow comment.
ja: キャッシュフローのコメントを考えてた。
zhTW: 不，我其實一直在想你關於自由現金流的評論。
vi: Khong, toi thuc su dang nghi ve binh luan dong tien tu do cua ban.

en: But this is a category where the free cash flows of, say, Whirlpool, it's a billion dollars. Iyer, who bought out GE, it's two billion dollars.
ja: Whirlpoolのキャッシュフローは10億。Iyer/GEは20億。
zhTW: 但這個品類裡，Whirlpool的自由現金流是十億，Iyer買了GE的是二十億。
vi: Nhung trong nganh nay, dong tien tu do cua Whirlpool la mot ty, Iyer mua GE la hai ty.

en: How many products do they have? They have five. How long did it take them to get there? A hundred years? What's happening here?
ja: 製品は何個?5個。何年かかった?100年?
zhTW: 他們有多少產品？五個。花了多久？一百年？這裡在發生什麼？
vi: Ho co bao nhieu san pham? Nam. Mat bao lau? Mot tram nam? Dang xay ra gi o day?

en: Kevin has an offer on the table which doesn't always stay there. Actually, I have to be honest with you guys.
ja: ケビンの提案は永遠にあるわけじゃない。正直に言うと、
zhTW: 凱文的報價不一定會一直在。說實話。
vi: De nghi cua Kevin khong phai luc nao cung co. That long ma noi.

en: I'm out. The only offer you had was me, and then you're talking to Cuban again.
ja: 降りる。唯一の提案だったのにキューバンと話してた。
zhTW: 我退出。你們唯一的報價是我的，然後你們又去跟庫班說。
vi: Toi rut. De nghi duy nhat la cua toi, roi cac ban lai noi chuyen voi Cuban.

en: You know, Mr. Wonderful doesn't feel good about that. You hurt his feelings.
ja: ケビンは傷ついた。
zhTW: Mr. Wonderful不高興了。你傷了他的感情。
vi: Mr. Wonderful khong vui. Ban lam ton thuong ong ay.

en: I now will forget who you are tomorrow morning because there's going to be five more deals coming through that door.
ja: 明日には忘れる。次の5つの取引が来るから。
zhTW: 明天早上我就會忘記你們是誰，因為還有五個交易要來。
vi: Sang mai toi se quen cac ban la ai vi se co nam thuong vu nua buoc vao.

en: I'm out. See you guys later. Ciao. We wanted to offer a royalty. I'm not sure if there's a way to get you back in.
ja: 降りる。ロイヤリティを提案したい。
zhTW: 我退出。再見。我們想提供版稅。不知道有沒有辦法讓你回來。
vi: Toi rut. Tam biet. Chung toi muon de nghi tien ban quyen. Khong biet co cach nao de ban quay lai.

en: What's your offer? We can be a little flexible on the valuation.
ja: 提案は?評価額は柔軟にできる。
zhTW: 你的提議是什麼？我們可以在估值上靈活一點。
vi: De nghi cua ban la gi? Chung toi co the linh hoat ve dinh gia.

en: Let's do a royalty, particularly tied to your channels. No, I'm not doing that.
ja: ロイヤリティ、特にあなたのチャネルに。ダメ。
zhTW: 做版稅，特別是綁定你的渠道。不，我不做那個。
vi: Lam tien ban quyen, gan voi kenh cua ban. Khong, toi khong lam vay.

en: The minute my name is on this, it's every unit gets a royalty because all of a sudden it's a Mr. Wonderful deal.
ja: 僕の名前がついたら全製品にロイヤリティ。
zhTW: 我的名字一上去，每個產品都要版稅，因為它變成了Mr. Wonderful的交易。
vi: Khi ten toi gan vao, moi san pham deu tra ban quyen vi no tro thanh thuong vu cua Mr. Wonderful.

en: If you don't believe that, talk to my 54 CEOs. See what they say. What's the royalty you would give?
ja: 54社のCEOに聞いてみろ。ロイヤリティはいくら?
zhTW: 如果不信，問我54個CEO。你們願意給多少版稅？
vi: Khong tin thi hoi 54 CEO cua toi. Ban san sang tra bao nhieu ban quyen?

en: Yeah, but only on what Kevin generates. No, I'm not doing that. He's making him a commissioned salesperson.
ja: ケビンが生み出した分だけ。ダメ。彼をセールスマンにする気か。
zhTW: 但只算凱文帶來的。不，我不做那個。他把他變成拿佣金的銷售員。
vi: Nhung chi tinh phan Kevin tao ra. Khong, toi khong lam vay. Anh ay bien ong thanh nhan vien ban hang an hoa hong.

en: I'm an investor with a huge brand. I'm just curious. What's the royalty you would give? What would you give? You do the marketing on this?
ja: 僕はブランドを持つ投資家だ。ロイヤリティはいくら?
zhTW: 我是有強大品牌的投資者。我只是好奇，你們給多少版稅？你們做行銷的話呢？
vi: Toi la nha dau tu co thuong hieu lon. Toi chi to mo, ban cho bao nhieu ban quyen? Ban lam marketing thi sao?

en: I'm not doing that deal. I'm not for hire. I'm the one asking. Where's the fridge? It was $50. $50 a fridge until you get your money back?
ja: 僕はやらない。$50。$50で回収できるまで?
zhTW: 我不做那個交易。我是問的人。多少？50美元一台冰箱。
vi: Toi khong lam thuong vu do. Toi la nguoi hoi. Bao nhieu? 50 do mot tu lanh.

en: I just want to throw something back at you, okay? No qualifiers, but $600,000, $50 a fridge, that's it?
ja: 条件なし、60万、一台$50。それだけ?
zhTW: 我想回你一個，好嗎？不附帶條件。600,000美元，每台50美元，就這樣？
vi: Toi muon dua lai mot cau, duoc khong? Khong dieu kien. 600,000 do, 50 do moi tu, the thoi?

en: If we can keep the regular equity ask, we'll do $50 every fridge. $50 every fridge.
ja: 通常の持分を維持するなら全冷蔵庫$50。
zhTW: 如果能保持原來的股權要求，我們會每台給50美元。每台50美元。
vi: Neu giu nguyen ty le co phan, chung toi tra 50 do moi tu. 50 do moi tu.

en: Would you do it at 5%? 4%. 5%? 4%.
vi: Ban chiu 5% khong? 4%. 5%? 4%.

en: 5%? Can we talk about that for one sec? I'd do it at 3% in perpetuity. Which is forever.
ja: 5%?ちょっと話していい?3%で永久に。
zhTW: 5%？能讓我們討論一下嗎？我願意3%永久。永久就是永遠。
vi: 5%? Cho chung toi ban khong? Toi chiu 3% vinh vien. Vinh vien la mai mai.

en: Take the deal. We plan to be around for a long time. It looks like a long time.
ja: 受けろ。長く続ける予定だ。
zhTW: 接受吧。我們打算長期經營。
vi: Nhan di. Chung toi du dinh ton tai lau dai.

en: As long as we're all cool. 4% and until you get your money back. We'll meet you in the middle.
ja: 4%で回収まで。中間で会おう。
zhTW: 4%，直到你拿回本金。我們折衷吧。
vi: 4% cho den khi anh lay lai von. Gap nhau o giua.

en: How about 4% until I get my money back plus another $300,000?
ja: 4%で回収+30万で?
zhTW: 4%直到我拿回本金再加30萬怎麼樣？
vi: 4% cho den khi toi lay lai von cong them 300,000 thi sao?

en: Done. Done. There you go. Wonderful. Boom. Who knew?
ja: 成立。素晴らしい。
zhTW: 成交。成交。太好了。棒極了。
vi: Xong. Xong. Tuyet voi. Boom.

en: Now I bought that other fridge. Well, we're going to have to replace them. Thank you.
ja: あの冷蔵庫買ったんだ。取り替えないと。
zhTW: 我買了那個另外的冰箱。嗯，我們得換掉它們。謝謝。
vi: Toi da mua cai tu lanh kia. A, chung toi phai thay chung. Cam on.

en: Thank you. Good deal. Thank you. Congratulations, guys. Thank you. Thank you, everyone.
ja: ありがとう。いい取引だ。おめでとう。
zhTW: 謝謝。好交易。謝謝。恭喜。
vi: Cam on. Thuong vu tot. Cam on. Chuc mung.

en: We did it!
ja: やったー!
zhTW: 我們做到了！
vi: Chung ta lam duoc roi!
